text: Being here, I am acutely aware of both clarity and confusion. The glass walls and clean lines create a sense of separation between observer and observed—the outside and the inside. Moving into the R+D exhibit, words about confusion and purpose flicker across screens, echoing my own feelings. This environment invites reflection: am I an observer, a participant, or both? There is a strange comfort in not knowing, in simply existing amidst innovation and ideas, letting meaning emerge as it will.
